Home/FHA Mortgage Rates Florida
FHA Mortgage Rates Florida

Current FHA mortgage rates in Florida

FHA mortgage rates in Florida change daily and are often lower than conventional rates. Instead of a teaser number, get a real personalized FHA rate based on your actual profile.

Get My Free Rate QuoteCall __PHONE_DISPLAY__
Rates update dailyOften below conventionalNo credit impact to quote15 & 30-year terms

Get your free FHA quote

No obligation. See your rate & payment in minutes.

🔒 Your information is secure. By submitting you agree to be contacted about FHA loan options. This is not a commitment to lend.

Thank you!

An FHA mortgage specialist will reach out shortly with your personalized Florida rate quote.

Today's Pricing

Current FHA mortgage rates in Florida

FHA mortgage rates in Florida change daily with the market and are often competitive with — or lower than — conventional rates, because they're backed by the federal government. The only way to know your true rate is a personalized quote based on your scenario.

  • Your credit score and overall profile
  • Loan amount and down payment
  • Loan term — 15-year vs 30-year
  • Whether you buy discount points
  • Current market and bond conditions

Why we don't post a single “today's rate”

You'll see plenty of sites advertise one eye-catching number, but that rate almost never applies to a real borrower. Mortgage rates move throughout the day, and your actual FHA rate depends on factors unique to you. We'd rather show you a real, personalized quote than a teaser figure.

FHA vs. conventional rates in Florida

FHA base interest rates are frequently lower than conventional rates for borrowers with lower credit scores, because the government insurance reduces lender risk. Keep in mind FHA loans also include mortgage insurance, so the best way to compare true cost is to look at both options side by side — something we'll happily do for you.

Can I lower my FHA rate?

Yes. Improving your credit score, increasing your down payment, choosing a shorter term, or buying discount points can all reduce your rate. We'll model the trade-offs so you can choose what fits your budget.

Questions & Answers

Frequently asked questions

What are current FHA mortgage rates in Florida?+
FHA mortgage rates in Florida change daily and depend on your credit score, loan amount, down payment, term, and market conditions. FHA rates are frequently competitive with or lower than conventional rates. Request a free personalized quote to see your real rate today.
Are FHA rates lower than conventional rates in Florida?+
FHA base interest rates are often lower than conventional rates, especially for borrowers with lower credit scores, because federal insurance reduces lender risk. FHA loans also include mortgage insurance, so it's best to compare total cost side by side.
How can I get the lowest FHA rate in Florida?+
Improving your credit score, making a larger down payment, choosing a shorter loan term, and buying discount points can all lower your FHA rate. A specialist can model these options for your situation.
Does getting an FHA rate quote affect my credit?+
Requesting a personalized rate quote does not have to impact your credit score. We can provide an estimate based on the information you share before any hard credit pull.
